meta.title: Why is the Navy's new stealth fighter called the F/A-XX?
meta.description:
The F/A prefix on a fighter is meant to indicate that it's a Fighter/Attack aircraft... but all modern fighters are expected to have these capabilities. 

So what's with the name?

#fa18 #f18 #f35 #f35c #stealth #stealthfighter #6thgeneration #airpower #shorts
